ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the property is located */,
  "crim" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "nox" REAL /*  Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes in $1000's */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, public records) */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the detailed property information */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under construction) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed for sale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_details ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the region is located */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_household_size" REAL /* Median household size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., survey, public records, API) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the indicator applies */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the demographic data applies */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the population in the specified age group and gender */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population (e.g., low, middle, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the metric applies */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the environmental metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental metric (e.g., air quality, water quality) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the environmental metric */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the environmental metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property type */,
  "property_features" TEXT /* Features of the property type (e.g., pool, garden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_details" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing data record */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "garage_size" INTEGER /* Size of the garage in square feet */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under construction) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_details_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_details_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., auction, private sale) */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing (e.g., mortgage, cash) */,
  "sale_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_details ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Dr., Mr., Ms.) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data record that was corrected */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "correction_description" TEXT /* Description of the correction */,
  "corrected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the correction */,
  "correction_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the correction */,
  "correction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_corrected_by FOREIGN KEY ("corrected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data record that was annotated */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_details ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., deed, inspection report) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_details ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
